title: Hieracium laniceps
taxonomy: Hieracium laniceps is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Hieracium, which consists of hawkweeds. This species is further categorized as a type of perennial plant. Within the Asteraceae family, Hieracium laniceps is part of the subfamily Cichorioideae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe.
